C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc libutil.a CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/command.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/console.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/dehacked.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/mnemonics.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/m_argv.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/m_archive.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/m_bbox.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/m_dll.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/m_fixed.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/m_misc.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/m_random.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/m_swap.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/md5.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/parser.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/tables.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/vfile.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/wad.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/w_wad.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/z_cache.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/util.dir/util/z_zone.cpp.obj
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ranlib.exe libutil.a
